description: Provides financial protection for beneficiaries in case of death of the insured person.

coverage.death_benefit: Pays a lump sum to the nominated beneficiaries in case of death.
coverage.terminal_illness: Covers early payout in case of diagnosed terminal illness.

exclusions: Suicide within first 12 months of policy
Death caused by criminal acts or reckless behavior
user_responsibilities: Provide valid ID and health history
